trivia: The forgotten NG: a shrunken 737 that only 69 customers' worth of orders ever justified. Most were retired young, making the smallest NG one of the rarest Boeing narrowbodies flying.
Almost none carry winglets, which combined with the stubby body makes a -600 oddly easy to confirm.
funFacts: SAS was the launch customer and biggest operator.
